# SqlManagementClient
API version: 2017-03-01-preview

## Auth
OAuth2

## Base URL
https://management.azure.com

## Setup
1. Configure auth: OAuth2
2. GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies -- verify access

## Endpoints

4 endpoints across 1 groups. See references/api-spec.lap for full details.

### subscriptions
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName} | Gets a managed database's short term retention policy. |
| PUT | /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName} | Updates a managed database's short term retention policy. |
| PATCH | /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName} | Updates a managed database's short term retention policy. |
| GET | /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies | Gets a managed database's short term retention policy list. |

## Common Questions

Match user requests to endpoints in references/api-spec.lap. Key patterns:
- "Get backupShortTermRetentionPolicy details?" -> GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName}
- "Update a backupShortTermRetentionPolicy?" -> PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName}
- "Partially update a backupShortTermRetentionPolicy?" -> PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies/{policyName}
- "List all backupShortTermRetentionPolicies?" -> GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/managedInstances/{managedInstanceName}/databases/{databaseName}/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
- "How to authenticate?" -> See Auth section
